title: Spanish Beef Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make beef stir fry dish with a Spanish twist, perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: 1. Heat the olive oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
2. Add the sliced onions and cook until they start to brown, about 3-4 minutes.
3. Add the beef and cook until browned, about 5-6 minutes.
4. Add the bell peppers and cook until they start to soften, about 2-3 minutes.
5. Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
6. Stir in the gooey syrup, paprika (if using), salt, and pepper.
7. Continue to cook for another 2-3 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
8. Serve hot over rice or noodles.
